title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 375.106 - Insurance producers, limitations on negotiated contracts
text:
375.106.  Insurance producers, limitations on negotiated contracts. — Insurance producers acting on behalf of an applicant for insurance or insured shall negotiate contracts of insurance only with authorized domestic insurance companies, licensed insurance * producers, foreign insurance companies duly admitted to do business in this state, or with a duly licensed surplus lines broker.
(L. 1961 p. 504 § 10, A.L. 1967 p. 516, A.L. 1981 S.B. 10, A.L. 2001 S.B. 193) 
Effective 1-01-03 
*Word "insurance" appears in original rolls.
